subject: [PATCH pynfs v3 10/26] server41tests: test no notifications without GFLAG_EXTEND

2026-06-19.patch_summary: This patch adds a test case to the server41tests suite to verify that when a file is created in a delegated directory, the server issues a CB_RECALL instead of a CB_NOTIFY if the NOTIFY4_GFLAG_EXTEND flag is not set. The test case requests a dir delegation with NOTIFY4_ADD_ENTRY but without NOTIFY4_GFLAG_EXTEND and checks for the correct callback response.
